response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, some Java/C#) and strong craftsmanship values (TDD, testing, CI/CD). However, the role demands deep JVM expertise, strong Kotlin skills, and hands-on Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate experience, plus genuine interest in IDE internals. The resume shows only incidental Java work (robotic arms at Altom, C/C++ at NI on a C IDE), no Kotlin, no Spring ecosystem, and no language-tooling/IDE-internals background beyond brief CVI exposure a decade ago.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing, refactoring dojos
Brief exposure to IDE development (LabWindows/CVI at National Instruments)
Experience with large-scale, complex systems and tooling/frameworks
concerns: No demonstrated Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience
Java listed as a skill but minimal recent or deep JVM work; no Kotlin
No evidence of IDE internals or language-tooling work in recent roles

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering craftsmanship and complex-systems track record
